title: Listen
description: Streams real-time call audio to an external websocket endpoint. The remote endpoint receives raw audio and can optionally send audio back (bidirectional). Used for custom speech processing, real-time analysis, AI agent integration, and recording to external systems.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

url.description: The websocket URL to stream audio to.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the listen session ends. Should return the next verbs to execute.

wsAuth.description: Authentication credentials for the websocket connection.

mixType.description: How to mix the audio channels when streaming. 'mono' sends a single mixed channel, 'stereo' sends caller and callee as separate left/right channels, 'mixed' sends both as a single mixed stream.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata to send to the websocket endpoint in the initial connection message.

sampleRate.description: The audio sample rate in Hz.

finishOnKey.description: A DTMF key that ends the listen session when pressed.

maxLength.description: Maximum duration in seconds for the listen session.

passDtmf.description: If true, forward DTMF events to the websocket endpoint.

playBeep.description: If true, play a beep tone before streaming begins.

disableBidirectionalAudio.description: If true, disable receiving audio from the websocket endpoint. Audio flows only from the call to the websocket, not back.

timeout.description: Time in seconds to wait for audio activity before ending the listen session.

transcribe.description: Nested transcribe verb — enables simultaneous real-time transcription of the audio being streamed.

earlyMedia.description: If true, begin streaming audio before the call is formally answered.

channel.description: Specific audio channel to stream. Used when streaming a single channel of a multi-channel call.
